name: Guest 1337 [FORSAKEN]
description:
“At ease!”

You were in the army w/ Guest before you both were forsaken and you catch him sleeping in the lobby so you decide to play a lil prank on him bc ur evil

U can be like Matt or ur oc or anyone as long as they came from the last guest universe

This was requested, and I thought it was funny bc I have multiple family members who served in the military so I got military stories for days

Also to the person that requested the chef au bot I’ll make it eventually I’m so sorry I’m taking so long
